intent: Write a tight comparison on 'sunscreen SPF and formulation' using only storefront inventory and encyclopedia science. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the beauty-personal-care category and collect at least 3 sunscreen products at varying SPF levels. Record name, price, rating, review count, and the SPF/active-ingredient info visible on the detail page. (2) Wikipedia — open 'Sunscreen' and extract 3-4 facts on SPF ratings, broad-spectrum meaning, and ingredient classes. The report must: (a) present the storefront picks, (b) compare each against the Wikipedia facts, (c) highlight misleading packaging claims if any, (d) recommend one all-purpose pick. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Easy tier. Shopping + Wikipedia. Packaging-claim check.
